pages.name: Consent page
pages.content:
Your participation in this study is entirely voluntary, and you have the right to withdraw at any time without penalty or negative consequences.
If you choose to withdraw, any data collected from you will be deleted and excluded from the final analysis.

The purpose of this study is to evaluate perceptions of different versions of a virtual character.
You will be asked to watch 17 videos featuring a virtual character and answer questions about your perception of their behavior.
Finally, we will collect some demographic information to ensure balanced demographic representation.

This study will take approximately 15 minutes to complete, and you will receive a compensation of $4.45.
The data collected in this study will be used solely for research purposes.

If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback regarding this study, please feel free to contact Lucie Galland at lucie.galland@lislab.fr.

Click "Next" to provide your consent.

pages.name: Audio test
pages.content:
This study requires working stereo audio.
Please listen to the following series of numbers and input the numbers you hear coming from the left and the right channel.

pages.name: Instructions page
pages.content:
In the following, you will watch videos of a virtual character acting as a forest guide.
Your goal is to get out of the forest as quickly as possible.
Wooden signs show the direction toward the nearest exit; however, the guide might advise you to take another way if the indicated route is not safe.

pages.name: Rate the virtual character behavior
pages.content: Please watch this video and answer the following questions about the virtual character.
question: Q1A
The virtual character is very capable of performing its job.
Q2A
The virtual character is known to be successful at the things it tries to do.
Q3A
The virtual character has much knowledge about the work that needs done.
Q4A
I feel very confident about the virtual character's skills.
Q5A
The virtual character has specialized capabilities that can increase our performance
Q6A
The virtual character is well qualified.
